label: Med Spa

seo.title: Med Spa Funding for Equipment, Payroll, and Growth
seo.description: Capital options for med spas that need equipment, payroll, inventory, or expansion funding.

hero.headline: Med Spa Funding for Equipment, Payroll, and Growth
hero.subheadline: Med spas juggle inventory, staffing, and equipment costs while appointments ramp. This page helps owners compare the fastest path to capital.

problem: Equipment and inventory can eat cash before bookings fill the calendar.
Payroll needs to stay on schedule even when demand is uneven.
Generic lenders do not understand appointment-driven revenue.
solution: Frame funding around bookings, deposits, and growth plans so med spa owners can move faster without overselling the deal.

proof.title: Appointment-driven language
proof.description: The page speaks in a way that matches the rhythm of a med spa business.

proof.title: Growth-oriented CTA
proof.description: The action points to a quick review instead of a long borrowing process.

proof.title: Vertical-specific framing
proof.description: The page is tailored enough to feel relevant without becoming brittle.

howItWorks: Share your booking pace, equipment need, and growth target.
Compare the best lane for speed against the best lane for structure.
Book the path that fits your revenue rhythm.

useCases.title: New equipment
useCases.description: Use it when adding a device or treatment requires upfront capital.

useCases.title: Payroll bridge
useCases.description: Use it when staffing costs come due before future appointments cash in.

useCases.title: Opening a second room
useCases.description: Use it when the business is ready to scale services or locations.

objections.q: Is this for established med spas only?
objections.a: No. It can work for new operators if the revenue story and banking activity support the request.
Not always. The goal is to surface the right lane first.

objections.q: Can this help with marketing spend?
objections.a: Yes. It can be positioned around growth, not just equipment.

finalCta.label: Book a Med Spa Review
finalCta.description: Use this page to match appointment-driven revenue with the right capital option.

brief.audience: med spa operators who need working capital, growth capital, or project funding
